action_mappings.assign_payment_batch_to_case: assign payment batch {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.unassign_payment_batch_from_case: unassign payment batch {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.apply_suspense_tag_to_case: apply suspense tag {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.remove_suspense_tag_from_case: remove suspense tag {} from reconciliation case {}

action_mappings.apply_automated_hold_and_flag_approval: apply automated hold and flag approval for reconciliation case {} using automation rule {}
action_mappings.adjudicate_case_with_attachment: adjudicate reconciliation case {} with suspense tag {} and supporting attachment {}
action_mappings.adjudicate_case_with_confirmation: adjudicate reconciliation case {} with confirmation document {}
action_mappings.link_payment_instruction_to_case: link payment instruction {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.unlink_payment_instruction_from_case: unlink payment instruction {} from reconciliation case {}

action_mappings.unlink_counterparty_account_from_case: unlink counterparty account {} from reconciliation case {}

action_mappings.unlink_bank_entry_from_case: unlink bank statement entry {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.link_exception_code_to_case: link exception reason code {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.unlink_exception_code_from_case: unlink exception reason code {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.create_ledger_posting_candidate: create ledger posting candidate for reconciliation case {} with ledger account {}, payment instruction {}, and counterparty account {}
action_mappings.validate_and_create_ledger_candidate_wit: validate and create ledger candidate for reconciliation case {} with ledger account {}, bank statement entry {}, and bank reference file {}
action_mappings.clear_interim_validation_flags: clear interim validation flags for reconciliation case {} with payment instruction {} and counterparty account {}
action_mappings.start_case_resolution_by_resolver: start case resolution for reconciliation case {} by resolver role {} with payment instruction {} and counterparty account {}
action_mappings.start_case_resolution_with_approver_esca: start case resolution with approver escalation for reconciliation case {} by approver role {} with bank statement entry {} and exception reason code {}
action_mappings.finalize_case_resolution: finalize case resolution for reconciliation case {} with payment instruction {} and counterparty account {}
action_mappings.adjudicate_resolved_case_with_attachment: adjudicate resolved case reconciliation case {} with suspense tag {} and supporting attachment {}
action_mappings.mark_case_confirmation_pending_for_suspe: mark case confirmation pending for reconciliation case {} with suspense tag {}
action_mappings.mark_case_confirmation_pending_by_automa: mark case confirmation pending for reconciliation case {} using automation rule {}
action_mappings.ingest_confirmation_document_to_case: ingest confirmation document {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.record_external_confirmation_from_source: record external confirmation from source system {} using processing node {} with confirmation document {}
action_mappings.mark_case_ready_for_close: mark reconciliation case {} as ready for close with suspense tag {} and supporting attachment {}
action_mappings.perform_final_close: perform final close on reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.perform_final_close_with_confirmation: perform final close on reconciliation case {} with confirmation document {}
action_mappings.perform_final_close_after_readiness: perform final close on reconciliation case {} after readiness

action_mappings_indef.open_reconciliation_case: open a reconciliation case {} for registration
action_mappings_indef.assign_payment_batch_to_case: assign a payment batch {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unassign_payment_batch_from_case: unassign a payment batch {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_suspense_tag_to_case: apply a suspense tag {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.remove_suspense_tag_from_case: remove a suspense tag {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_hold_from_suspense_tag: apply hold from a suspense tag {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_automated_hold_and_flag_approval: apply automated hold and flag approval for a reconciliation case {} using an automation rule {}

action_mappings_indef.adjudicate_case_with_confirmation: adjudicate a reconciliation case {} with a confirmation document {}
action_mappings_indef.link_payment_instruction_to_case: link a payment instruction {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unlink_payment_instruction_from_case: unlink a payment instruction {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.link_counterparty_account_to_case: link a counterparty account {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unlink_counterparty_account_from_case: unlink a counterparty account {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.link_bank_entry_to_case: link a bank statement entry {} to a reconciliation case {}

action_mappings_indef.link_exception_code_to_case: link an exception reason code {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unlink_exception_code_from_case: unlink an exception reason code {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.create_ledger_posting_candidate: create ledger posting candidate for a reconciliation case {} with a ledger account {}, a payment instruction {}, and a counterparty account {}
action_mappings_indef.validate_and_create_ledger_candidate_wit: validate and create ledger candidate for a reconciliation case {} with a ledger account {}, a bank statement entry {}, and a bank reference file {}
action_mappings_indef.clear_interim_validation_flags: clear interim validation flags for a reconciliation case {} with a payment instruction {} and a counterparty account {}

action_mappings_indef.start_case_resolution_with_approver_esca: start case resolution with approver escalation for a reconciliation case {} by an approver role {} with a bank statement entry {} and an exception reason code {}
action_mappings_indef.finalize_case_resolution: finalize case resolution for a reconciliation case {} with a payment instruction {} and a counterparty account {}
action_mappings_indef.adjudicate_resolved_case_with_attachment: adjudicate resolved case a reconciliation case {} with a suspense tag {} and a supporting attachment {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_case_confirmation_pending_for_suspe: mark case confirmation pending for a reconciliation case {} with a suspense tag {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_case_confirmation_pending_by_automa: mark case confirmation pending for a reconciliation case {} using an automation rule {}

predicate_mappings.case_assigned_batch: the case {} is assigned to the payment batch {}
predicate_mappings.case_batch_assigned: the case batch is assigned to {}
predicate_mappings.case_ledger_candidate: {} is a candidate for ledger account {}
predicate_mappings.confirmation_available_from_source: confirmation is available from the source for {} with {}
predicate_mappings.case_confirmation_recorded_from_source: case confirmation for {} is recorded from the source with {}
predicate_mappings.bank_reference_file_available: {} is a bank reference file available
predicate_mappings.exception_reason_code_available: {} is an exception reason code available
predicate_mappings.case_batch_candidate: {} is a case batch candidate for {}
predicate_mappings.case_ledger_candidate_relation: {} has a ledger candidate relation with {}
predicate_mappings.processing_node_confirmation_link: {} is processing the node confirmation link for {}
predicate_mappings.processing_node_in_cutoff_scope: {} is processing the node in cutoff scope
predicate_mappings.case_expected_confirmation: {} is expected to have confirmation from {}

open_reconciliation_case.description: open a reconciliation case A for registration
preconditions: I can only open a reconciliation case A for registration if it is not the case that the case A is registered and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I open a reconciliation case A for registration, it is the case that the case A is registered

assign_payment_batch_to_case.description: assign a payment batch B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only assign a payment batch B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a case batch candidate for B
I can only assign a payment batch B to a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the case batch is assigned to A
effects: Once I assign a payment batch B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A is assigned to the payment batch B and the case batch is assigned to A
Once I assign a payment batch B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unassign_payment_batch_from_case.description: unassign a payment batch B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unassign a payment batch B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is assigned to the payment batch B
I can only unassign a payment batch B from a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A is validated for the ledger and it is not the case that A resolution is in progress
effects: Once I unassign a payment batch B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I unassign a payment batch B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is assigned to the payment batch B and it is not the case anymore that the case batch is assigned to A and it is not the case anymore that A is on hold and it is not the case anymore that A has been adjudicated and it is not the case anymore that A requires approval and it is not the case anymore that A resolution is complete and it is not the case anymore that A has an accounting review flag

apply_suspense_tag_to_case.description: apply a suspense tag B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only apply a suspense tag B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and suspense tag available B
effects: Once I apply a suspense tag B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A has a suspense tag B
Once I apply a suspense tag B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that suspense tag available B

remove_suspense_tag_from_case.description: remove a suspense tag B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only remove a suspense tag B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A has a suspense tag B
effects: Once I remove a suspense tag B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that suspense tag available B
Once I remove a suspense tag B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a suspense tag B

apply_hold_from_suspense_tag.description: apply hold from a suspense tag B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only apply hold from a suspense tag B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the case batch is assigned to A and A has a suspense tag B
I can only apply hold from a suspense tag B to a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A is on hold
effects: Once I apply hold from a suspense tag B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is on hold

apply_automated_hold_and_flag_approval.description: apply automated hold and flag approval for a reconciliation case A using an automation rule B
preconditions: I can only apply automated hold and flag approval for a reconciliation case A using an automation rule B if it is the case that the case A is registered and the case batch is assigned to A and B is an automation rule available
I can only apply automated hold and flag approval for a reconciliation case A using an automation rule B if it is not the case that A is on hold
effects: Once I apply automated hold and flag approval for a reconciliation case A using an automation rule B, it is the case that A is on hold and A requires approval
Once I apply automated hold and flag approval for a reconciliation case A using an automation rule B, it is not the case anymore that B is an automation rule available

adjudicate_case_with_attachment.description: adjudicate a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C
preconditions: I can only adjudicate a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C if it is the case that A is on hold and the case batch is assigned to A and A has a suspense tag B and C is a supporting attachment available
I can only adjudicate a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C if it is not the case that A has been adjudicated
effects: Once I adjudicate a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C, it is the case that A has been adjudicated
Once I adjudicate a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C, it is not the case anymore that A requires approval

adjudicate_case_with_confirmation.description: adjudicate a reconciliation case A with a confirmation document B
preconditions: I can only adjudicate a reconciliation case A with a confirmation document B if it is the case that the case batch is assigned to A and case confirmation for A is recorded from the source with B
I can only adjudicate a reconciliation case A with a confirmation document B if it is not the case that A has been adjudicated
effects: Once I adjudicate a reconciliation case A with a confirmation document B, it is the case that A has been adjudicated
Once I adjudicate a reconciliation case A with a confirmation document B, it is not the case anymore that A requires approval

link_payment_instruction_to_case.description: link a payment instruction B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a payment instruction B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A has a payment instruction candidate B
effects: Once I link a payment instruction B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A has a payment instruction B
Once I link a payment instruction B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_payment_instruction_from_case.description: unlink a payment instruction B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a payment instruction B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A has a payment instruction B
effects: Once I unlink a payment instruction B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a payment instruction B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a payment instruction B

link_counterparty_account_to_case.description: link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A has a counterparty candidate B
effects: Once I link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A has a counterparty account B
Once I link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_counterparty_account_from_case.description: unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A has a counterparty account B
effects: Once I unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a counterparty account B

link_bank_entry_to_case.description: link a bank statement entry B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a bank statement entry B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A has a bank entry candidate B
effects: Once I link a bank statement entry B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A has a bank statement entry B
Once I link a bank statement entry B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_bank_entry_from_case.description: unlink a bank statement entry B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a bank statement entry B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A has a bank statement entry B
effects: Once I unlink a bank statement entry B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a bank statement entry B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a bank statement entry B

link_exception_code_to_case.description: link an exception reason code B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link an exception reason code B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is an exception reason code available and A has an exception code candidate B
effects: Once I link an exception reason code B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A has an exception reason code B
Once I link an exception reason code B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an exception reason code available

unlink_exception_code_from_case.description: unlink an exception reason code B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink an exception reason code B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A has an exception reason code B
effects: Once I unlink an exception reason code B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is an exception reason code available
Once I unlink an exception reason code B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A has an exception reason code B

create_ledger_posting_candidate.description: create ledger posting candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger account B, a payment instruction C, and a counterparty account D
preconditions: I can only create ledger posting candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger account B, a payment instruction C, and a counterparty account D if it is the case that the case batch is assigned to A and A has a payment instruction C and A has a counterparty account D and B is available and A has a ledger candidate relation with B

I can only create ledger posting candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger account B, a payment instruction C, and a counterparty account D if it is not the case that A is validated for the ledger
effects: Once I create ledger posting candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger account B, a payment instruction C, and a counterparty account D, it is the case that A is a candidate for ledger account B and A is validated for the ledger
Once I create ledger posting candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger account B, a payment instruction C, and a counterparty account D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

validate_and_create_ledger_candidate_wit.description: validate and create ledger candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger account B, a bank statement entry C, and a bank reference file D
preconditions: I can only validate and create ledger candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger account B, a bank statement entry C, and a bank reference file D if it is the case that the case batch is assigned to A and A has a bank statement entry C and D is a bank reference file available and B is available and A has a ledger candidate relation with B and A has a bank reference candidate D

I can only validate and create ledger candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger account B, a bank statement entry C, and a bank reference file D if it is not the case that A is validated for the ledger
effects: Once I validate and create ledger candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger account B, a bank statement entry C, and a bank reference file D, it is the case that A is a candidate for ledger account B and A is validated for the ledger and A has an accounting review flag and A requires approval

Once I validate and create ledger candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger account B, a bank statement entry C, and a bank reference file D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is a bank reference file available

clear_interim_validation_flags.description: clear interim validation flags for a reconciliation case A with a payment instruction B and a counterparty account C
preconditions: I can only clear interim validation flags for a reconciliation case A with a payment instruction B and a counterparty account C if it is the case that A is validated for the ledger and A has an accounting review flag and A has a payment instruction B and A has a counterparty account C
effects: Once I clear interim validation flags for a reconciliation case A with a payment instruction B and a counterparty account C, it is not the case anymore that A has an accounting review flag and it is not the case anymore that A requires approval

start_case_resolution_by_resolver.description: start case resolution for a reconciliation case A by a resolver role D with a payment instruction B and a counterparty account C
preconditions: I can only start case resolution for a reconciliation case A by a resolver role D with a payment instruction B and a counterparty account C if it is the case that A has been adjudicated and A is validated for the ledger and A has a payment instruction B and A has a counterparty account C and A is assigned to the role D

I can only start case resolution for a reconciliation case A by a resolver role D with a payment instruction B and a counterparty account C if it is not the case that A requires approval and it is not the case that A resolution is in progress
effects: Once I start case resolution for a reconciliation case A by a resolver role D with a payment instruction B and a counterparty account C, it is the case that A resolution is in progress

start_case_resolution_with_approver_esca.description: start case resolution with approver escalation for a reconciliation case A by an approver role D with a bank statement entry B and an exception reason code C
preconditions: I can only start case resolution with approver escalation for a reconciliation case A by an approver role D with a bank statement entry B and an exception reason code C if it is the case that A has been adjudicated and A is validated for the ledger and A has a bank statement entry B and A has an exception reason code C and A is assigned to the role D

I can only start case resolution with approver escalation for a reconciliation case A by an approver role D with a bank statement entry B and an exception reason code C if it is not the case that A resolution is in progress
effects: Once I start case resolution with approver escalation for a reconciliation case A by an approver role D with a bank statement entry B and an exception reason code C, it is the case that A resolution is in progress and A requires approval

finalize_case_resolution.description: finalize case resolution for a reconciliation case A with a payment instruction B and a counterparty account C
preconditions: I can only finalize case resolution for a reconciliation case A with a payment instruction B and a counterparty account C if it is the case that A resolution is in progress and A requires approval and A has a payment instruction B and A has a counterparty account C
effects: Once I finalize case resolution for a reconciliation case A with a payment instruction B and a counterparty account C, it is the case that A resolution is complete

Once I finalize case resolution for a reconciliation case A with a payment instruction B and a counterparty account C, it is not the case anymore that A requires approval and it is not the case anymore that A has been adjudicated and it is not the case anymore that A has an accounting review flag

adjudicate_resolved_case_with_attachment.description: adjudicate resolved case a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C
preconditions: I can only adjudicate resolved case a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C if it is the case that A resolution is complete and A resolution is in progress and the case batch is assigned to A and A has a suspense tag B and C is a supporting attachment available
I can only adjudicate resolved case a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C if it is not the case that A has been adjudicated
effects: Once I adjudicate resolved case a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C, it is the case that A has been adjudicated

mark_case_confirmation_pending_for_suspe.description: mark case confirmation pending for a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B
preconditions: I can only mark case confirmation pending for a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B if it is the case that A resolution is in progress and A has been adjudicated and A has a suspense tag B
I can only mark case confirmation pending for a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B if it is not the case that A requires approval and it is not the case that A confirmation is pending
effects: Once I mark case confirmation pending for a reconciliation case A with a suspense tag B, it is the case that A confirmation is pending

mark_case_confirmation_pending_by_automa.description: mark case confirmation pending for a reconciliation case A using an automation rule B
preconditions: I can only mark case confirmation pending for a reconciliation case A using an automation rule B if it is the case that A resolution is in progress and A has been adjudicated and B is an automation rule available
I can only mark case confirmation pending for a reconciliation case A using an automation rule B if it is not the case that A requires approval and it is not the case that A confirmation is pending
effects: Once I mark case confirmation pending for a reconciliation case A using an automation rule B, it is the case that A confirmation is pending
Once I mark case confirmation pending for a reconciliation case A using an automation rule B, it is not the case anymore that B is an automation rule available

ingest_confirmation_document_to_case.description: ingest a confirmation document B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only ingest a confirmation document B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A confirmation is pending and B is a confirmation document available and A is expected to have confirmation from B
effects: Once I ingest a confirmation document B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is processing the node confirmation link for B
Once I ingest a confirmation document B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is a confirmation document available

record_external_confirmation_from_source.description: record external confirmation from a source system A using a processing node B with a confirmation document C
preconditions: I can only record external confirmation from a source system A using a processing node B with a confirmation document C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A has an active source system and confirmation is available from the source for A with C and B is processing the node confirmation link for C

I can only record external confirmation from a source system A using a processing node B with a confirmation document C if it is not the case that case confirmation for A is recorded from the source with C
effects: Once I record external confirmation from a source system A using a processing node B with a confirmation document C, it is the case that case confirmation for A is recorded from the source with C

mark_case_ready_for_close.description: mark a reconciliation case A as ready for close with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C
preconditions: I can only mark a reconciliation case A as ready for close with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A has an active source system and A has been adjudicated and A confirmation is pending and A has a suspense tag B and C is a supporting attachment available
I can only mark a reconciliation case A as ready for close with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C if it is not the case that A is ready for close
effects: Once I mark a reconciliation case A as ready for close with a suspense tag B and a supporting attachment C, it is the case that A is ready for close

perform_final_close.description: perform final close on a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only perform final close on a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is processing the node in cutoff scope and the case A is registered and the case batch is assigned to A and A is validated for the ledger and A resolution is in progress and A confirmation is pending and A has been adjudicated
I can only perform final close on a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I perform final close on a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is closed

perform_final_close_with_confirmation.description: perform final close on a reconciliation case A with a confirmation document B
preconditions: I can only perform final close on a reconciliation case A with a confirmation document B if it is the case that A has an active source system and the case A is registered and the case batch is assigned to A and A is validated for the ledger and A resolution is in progress and A confirmation is pending and A has been adjudicated and case confirmation for A is recorded from the source with B
I can only perform final close on a reconciliation case A with a confirmation document B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I perform final close on a reconciliation case A with a confirmation document B, it is the case that A is closed

perform_final_close_after_readiness.description: perform final close on a reconciliation case A after readiness
preconditions: I can only perform final close on a reconciliation case A after readiness if it is the case that A has an active source system and the case A is registered and the case batch is assigned to A and A is validated for the ledger and A resolution is in progress and A confirmation is pending and A has been adjudicated and A is ready for close
I can only perform final close on a reconciliation case A after readiness if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I perform final close on a reconciliation case A after readiness, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.assign_payment_batch_to_case: assign payment batch {?payment_batch} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.unassign_payment_batch_from_case: unassign payment batch {?payment_batch} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_suspense_tag_to_case: apply suspense tag {?suspense_tag} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.remove_suspense_tag_from_case: remove suspense tag {?suspense_tag} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_hold_from_suspense_tag: apply hold from suspense tag {?suspense_tag} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_automated_hold_and_flag_approval: apply automated hold and flag approval for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using automation rule {?automation_rule}
action_nl_templates.adjudicate_case_with_attachment: adjudicate reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with suspense tag {?suspense_tag} and supporting attachment {?supporting_attachment}
action_nl_templates.adjudicate_case_with_confirmation: adjudicate reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with confirmation document {?confirmation_document}
action_nl_templates.link_payment_instruction_to_case: link payment instruction {?payment_instruction} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_payment_instruction_from_case: unlink payment instruction {?payment_instruction} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.link_counterparty_account_to_case: link counterparty account {?counterparty_account} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_counterparty_account_from_case: unlink counterparty account {?counterparty_account} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.link_bank_entry_to_case: link bank statement entry {?bank_statement_entry} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_bank_entry_from_case: unlink bank statement entry {?bank_statement_entry} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.link_exception_code_to_case: link exception reason code {?exception_reason_code} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_exception_code_from_case: unlink exception reason code {?exception_reason_code} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.create_ledger_posting_candidate: create ledger posting candidate for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with ledger account {?ledger_account}, payment instruction {?payment_instruction}, and counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates.validate_and_create_ledger_candidate_wit: validate and create ledger candidate for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with ledger account {?ledger_account}, bank statement entry {?bank_statement_entry}, and bank reference file {?bank_reference_file}
action_nl_templates.clear_interim_validation_flags: clear interim validation flags for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with payment instruction {?payment_instruction} and counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates.start_case_resolution_by_resolver: start case resolution for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} by resolver role {?resolver_role} with payment instruction {?payment_instruction} and counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates.start_case_resolution_with_approver_esca: start case resolution with approver escalation for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} by approver role {?approver_role} with bank statement entry {?bank_statement_entry} and exception reason code {?exception_reason_code}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_resolution: finalize case resolution for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with payment instruction {?payment_instruction} and counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates.adjudicate_resolved_case_with_attachment: adjudicate resolved case reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with suspense tag {?suspense_tag} and supporting attachment {?supporting_attachment}
action_nl_templates.mark_case_confirmation_pending_for_suspe: mark case confirmation pending for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with suspense tag {?suspense_tag}
action_nl_templates.mark_case_confirmation_pending_by_automa: mark case confirmation pending for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using automation rule {?automation_rule}
action_nl_templates.ingest_confirmation_document_to_case: ingest confirmation document {?confirmation_document} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.record_external_confirmation_from_source: record external confirmation from source system {?source_system} using processing node {?processing_node} with confirmation document {?confirmation_document}
action_nl_templates.mark_case_ready_for_close: mark reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} as ready for close with suspense tag {?suspense_tag} and supporting attachment {?supporting_attachment}
action_nl_templates.perform_final_close: perform final close on reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.perform_final_close_with_confirmation: perform final close on reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with confirmation document {?confirmation_document}
action_nl_templates.perform_final_close_after_readiness: perform final close on reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} after readiness

predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_batch: the case {?reconciliation_case} is assigned to the payment batch {?payment_batch}
predicate_nl_templates.case_batch_assigned: the case batch is assigned to {?reconciliation_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_ledger_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a candidate for ledger account {?ledger_account}
predicate_nl_templates.confirmation_available_from_source: confirmation is available from the source for {?reconciliation_case} with {?confirmation_document}
predicate_nl_templates.case_confirmation_recorded_from_source: case confirmation for {?reconciliation_case} is recorded from the source with {?confirmation_document}
predicate_nl_templates.bank_reference_file_available: {?bank_reference_file} is a bank reference file available
predicate_nl_templates.exception_reason_code_available: {?exception_reason_code} is an exception reason code available
predicate_nl_templates.case_batch_candidate: {?reconciliation_case} is a case batch candidate for {?payment_batch}
predicate_nl_templates.case_ledger_candidate_relation: {?reconciliation_case} has a ledger candidate relation with {?ledger_account}
predicate_nl_templates.processing_node_confirmation_link: {?reconciliation_case} is processing the node confirmation link for {?confirmation_document}
predicate_nl_templates.processing_node_in_cutoff_scope: {?reconciliation_case} is processing the node in cutoff scope
predicate_nl_templates.case_expected_confirmation: {?reconciliation_case} is expected to have confirmation from {?confirmation_document}

action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_payment_batch_from_case: unassign a payment batch {?payment_batch} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_bank_entry_from_case: unlink a bank statement entry {?bank_statement_entry} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_exception_code_from_case: unlink an exception reason code {?exception_reason_code} from a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.create_ledger_posting_candidate: create ledger posting candidate for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with a ledger account {?ledger_account}, a payment instruction {?payment_instruction}, and a counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.validate_and_create_ledger_candidate_wit: validate and create ledger candidate for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with a ledger account {?ledger_account}, a bank statement entry {?bank_statement_entry}, and a bank reference file {?bank_reference_file}

action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_resolution: finalize case resolution for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with a payment instruction {?payment_instruction} and a counterparty account {?counterparty_account}

action_nl_templates_indef.perform_final_close: perform final close on a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a base object is also a object

Everything that is a reconciliation case or a payment batch or a ledger account or a counterparty account or a payment instruction or a bank statement entry or a suspense tag or a automation rule or a confirmation document or a supporting attachment or a bank reference file or a exception reason code or a operator role is also a base object
Everything that is a resolver role or a approver role is also a operator role
Everything that is a processing node or a source system is also a reconciliation case
